_comment: Cron schedule notes: 0 12 * * * runs daily at 12:00 UTC. This produces 7:00 AM CDT in summer (DST active, UTC-5) and 6:00 AM CST in winter (DST inactive, UTC-6). Vercel cron is UTC-only with no DST awareness, so we optimize for summer (when seasonal income lands and bills are heavier) and accept a one-hour-early fire during Central Standard Time. If winter-accurate 7am is ever preferred, change to '0 13 * * *' (7am CST winter, 8am CDT summer).
